title: SkillsFuture Fellowships
text:
SkillsFuture Fellowships - SupportGoWhere
SkillsFuture Fellowships
Share link
Awards a $10,000 monetary award to support skills mastery for eligible Singapore Citizens.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Receive $10,000 to continue your learning journey
Open to Singapore Citizens with at least 10 years of working experience in the same (or related) industry or job function
Collapse all sections
About this support

Monetary award of $10,000 for skills mastery and lifelong learning

National recognition by the President of the Republic of Singapore

Opportunities to inspire and mentor future talent

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens

At least 10 years of working experience in the same or related industry or job function

How to apply?

Applications are now closed.

For further enquiries, please contact the Programme Manager for the SkillsFuture Fellowships.

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture Hotline: 6785 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours: 
Mondays to Fridays 
8.30 am to 5.30 pm 
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry

SkillsFuture Singapore

1 Paya Lebar Link,

#08-08, Paya Lebar Quarter 2

Singapore 408533

Scheme last updated 19 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
